scripts.generate: npm run rules:generate:ai && npm run skills:generate:ai
scripts.rules:generate:ai: npm run build:ai -w @dev-handbook/rules && mkdir -p ai/rules && cp -r packages/*/dist/ai/* ai/rules/
scripts.skills:generate:ai: npm run build -w @dev-handbook/skills && mkdir -p ai/skills && cp -r packages/skills/dist/* ai/skills/
